scripts.title: Arm Holdings Soars on AI Enthusiasm
scripts.hook: Arm Holdings jumped over eleven percent today.

beats.vo: The chip designer rallied sharply with the broader semiconductor sector, driven by renewed AI enthusiasm.
beats.caption: ARM: +11.12% on AI hype

beats.vo: This surge, alongside other big tech names, reflected strong investor confidence in advanced chip technology.
beats.caption: Sector-wide confidence

beats.vo: The sector's performance signals continued belief in advanced chip technology's future.
beats.caption: Future of chip tech

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Arm Holdings led today's market movers, with chip stocks continuing their strong run. For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Semiconductor Surge, Retailer Dip
scripts.hook: AMD shares climbed almost eight percent today.

beats.vo: The chipmaker gained as AI trade excitement reignited across the semiconductor sector, with Micron also up over seven percent.
beats.caption: AMD: +7.50% & MU: +7.26% on AI

beats.vo: On the downside, Costco fell over four-and-a-half percent, gapping lower with other S&P 500 names.
beats.caption: COST: -4.53% gap down

beats.vo: Palantir also dropped over four percent, despite new partnership announcements.
beats.caption: PLTR: -4.14% on news

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: From surging chip stocks to a dip in retail, here's a quick look at today's market. For information only — not financial advice.

scripts.title: Geopolitical Tensions in Focus
scripts.hook: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East were a key focus today.

beats.vo: Reuters reported Iran claimed to hit US military targets in the Gulf, following ballistic missile launches.
beats.caption: Iran claims US target hit

beats.vo: Despite these rising tensions, both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq still opened higher.
beats.caption: S&P 500, Nasdaq higher

beats.vo: This market resilience was largely driven by strong gains in chip stocks.
beats.caption: Chip stocks drive gains

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Geopolitical events unfolded today, but the market found resilience in tech. For information only — not financial advice.
